title: Situational awareness determination based on an annotated environmental model
abstract: Determining a situational annotation of a vehicle based on an annotated environmental model is disclosed. A computing system receives an annotated environmental model for a vehicle. The annotated environmental model can include data from a plurality of modalities. The computing system uses a classifier to determine an annotation of the vehicle situation based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model. The computing system provides the situational annotation to a driving functionality system. The driving functionality system is configured to use the situational annotation to generate signals to control operation the vehicle.
claims:
Claims [0094] WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: CLAIMS 1. A method comprising: receiving, at a computing system, an annotated environmental model for a vehicle, the annotated environmental model including data from a plurality of modalities; and using a classifier to determine a situational annotation of the vehicle based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising providing, by the computing system, the situational annotation to a driving functionality system, wherein the driving functionality system is configured to use the situational annotation to generate signals to control operation the vehicle. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the situational annotation of the vehicle is determined based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model and one or more of a region of interest in the environmental model, a predicted environmental model, and localization information. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the annotated environmental model includes raw measurement data that is temporally aligned and spatially aligned. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the plurality of modalities comprise one or more of raw measurement data from one or more sensors on the vehicle, fused sensor data, high level data, and data from one or more external sources. 6. The method of claim 1, further comprising providing the situational annotation to a region of interest management system, wherein the region of interest management system is configured to adjust a region of interest in the environmental model based, at least in part, on the situational annotation. 7. The method of claim 1, further comprising: determining that the situational annotation comprises an uncertain vehicle situation; and providing data associated with the situational annotation to an external node, wherein the external node is configured to use the data associated with the situational annotation to generate update data to update the classifier to classify the uncertain vehicle situation. 8. The method of claim 7, further comprising: receiving, from the external node, the update data; and updating the classifier based on the update data from the external node. 9. The method of claim 1, further comprising storing the updated environmental model and situational annotation to a memory associated with the vehicle, wherein the stored environmental model and situational annotation are used to evaluate an incident associated with the vehicle. 10. An apparatus comprising at least one memory device storing instructions configured to cause one or more processing devices to perform operations comprising: receiving an annotated environmental model for a vehicle, the annotated environmental model including data from a plurality of modalities; and using a classifier to determine a situational annotation of the vehicle based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model. 11. The apparatus of claim 10, wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the one or more processing devices to perform operations comprising providing the situational annotation to a driving functionality system, wherein the driving functionality system is configured to use the situational annotation to generate signals to control operation the vehicle. 12. The apparatus of claim 10, wherein the situational annotation of the vehicle is determined based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model and one or more of a region of interest in the environmental model, a predicted environmental model, and localization information. 13. The apparatus of claim 10, wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the one or more processing devices to perform operations comprising providing the situational annotation to a region of interest management system, wherein the region of interest management system is configured to adjust a region of interest in the environmental model based, at least in part, on the situational annotation. 14. The apparatus of claim 10, wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the one or more processing devices to perform operations comprising: 

 determining that the situational annotation comprises an uncertain vehicle situation; and providing data associated with the situational annotation to an external node, wherein the external node is configured to use the data associated with the situational annotation to generate update data to update the classifier to classify the uncertain vehicle situation. 15. The apparatus of claim 14, wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the one or more processing devices to perform operations comprising: receiving, from the external node, the update data; and updating the classifier based on the update data from the external node. 16. A system comprising: a memory device configured to store machine-readable instructions; and a computing system including one or more processing devices, in response to executing the machine-readable instructions, configured to: receive an annotated environmental model for a vehicle, the annotated environmental model including data from a plurality of modalities; and use a classifier to determine a situational annotation of the vehicle based, at least in part, on the annotated environmental model. 17. The system of claim 16, wherein the one or more processing devices, in response to executing the machine-readable instructions, are configured to provide the situational annotation to a driving functionality system, wherein the driving functionality system is configured to use the situational annotation to generate signals to control operation the vehicle. 18. The system of claim 16, wherein the one or more processing devices, in response to executing the machine-readable instructions, are configured to provide the situational annotation to a region of interest management system, wherein the region of interest management system is configured to adjust a region of interest in the environmental model based, at least in part, on the situational annotation. 19. The system of claim 16, wherein the one or more processing devices, in response to executing the machine-readable instructions, are configured to: determine that the situational annotation comprises an uncertain vehicle situation; and provide data associated with the situational annotation to an external node, wherein the external node is configured to use the data associated with the situational annotation to generate update data to update the classifier to classify the uncertain vehicle situation. 20. The system of claim 19, wherein the one or more processing devices, in response to executing the machine-readable instructions, are configured to: receive, from the external node, the update data; and update the classifier based on the update data from the external node.
